aws.name: aws-application-networking-k8s
aws.description: A Kubernetes controller for Amazon VPC Lattice

aws.name: aws-cdk
aws.description: The AWS Cloud Development Kit is a framework for defining cloud infrastructure in code

aws.name: aws-cli
aws.description: Universal Command Line Interface for Amazon Web Services

NVDA.title: NVIDIA Corporation - Company Overview
NVDA.content: Description: Nvidia Corporation is an American multinational technology company incorporated in Delaware and based in Santa Clara, California. It designs graphics processing units (GPUs) for the gaming and professional markets, as well as system on a chip units (SoCs) for the mobile computing and automotive market.

full_data.Name: NVIDIA Corporation
full_data.Description: Nvidia Corporation is an American multinational technology company incorporated in Delaware and based in Santa Clara, California. It designs graphics processing units (GPUs) for the gaming and professional markets, as well as system on a chip units (SoCs) for the mobile computing and automotive market.
full_data.Address: 2788 SAN TOMAS EXPRESSWAY, SANTA CLARA, CA, UNITED STATES, 95051
